raw_consumer_statement: This is regarding American Express dispute XXXX against XXXX. I ordered a headphone from them but instead there was no headphones inside the box. I did everything the merchant asked me and sent them photos of what I received showing no merchandise / headphone was inside what I received. I also filed a police report in their warehouse city like they requested. I am owed my money back. For some reason American Express reopened the dispute despite me providing ample evidence of the fact that inside the box I did not receive any headphones from this company. Instead I received the wrong item and I sent them photos of the wrong item that was inside the box.
